_meta.description: Pre-negotiation background events — use for scenario background text, not as turn nodes

events.title: China Launches Yuan-Denominated Crude Futures on Shanghai International Energy Exchange
events.description: China's Shanghai International Energy Exchange launched yuan-denominated crude oil futures, establishing an early institutional foundation for yuan participation in global oil markets. By 2020 these contracts accounted for approximately 10.5% of global crude futures volume.
events.source_excerpt: China's Shanghai International Energy Exchange yuan-denominated crude futures launched in March 2018 and accounted for ~10.5% of global crude futures volume by 2020.

events.title: Iran Completes IRGC Mosaic Defense Restructuring into 31 Autonomous Provincial Commands
events.description: Under restructuring completed by 2019, the IRGC was reorganized into 31 semi-autonomous provincial commands, each with independent intelligence, weapons stockpiles, and pre-delegated authority to launch strikes if communication with the center is severed.
events.source_excerpt: Under restructuring completed by 2019, the IRGC was reorganized into 31 semi-autonomous provincial commands, each with independent intelligence, weapons stockpiles, and pre-delegated authority to launch strikes if communication with the center is severed.

events.title: Mojtaba Khamenei Takes Control of Basij Paramilitary
events.description: Mojtaba Khamenei assumed control of the Basij paramilitary forces. He is later blamed by reformists for suppressing the Green Movement. US Treasury sanctioned him in 2019.
events.source_excerpt: Took control of the Basij paramilitary in 2009 and is blamed by reformists for suppressing the Green Movement. Sanctioned by US Treasury in 2019.

events.title: China Grants Iran Full Military Access to BeiDou-3 Encrypted Satellite Navigation System
events.description: China granted Iran full military access to its BeiDou-3 encrypted satellite navigation system, a capability experts believe Iran is currently using to guide attacks during the 2026 conflict.
events.source_excerpt: What is confirmed: China granted Iran full military access to its BeiDou-3 encrypted satellite navigation system in 2021, which experts believe Iran is currently using to guide attacks.

events.title: Over 20% of China's Oil Imports from Russia Settled in Yuan
events.description: By mid-2023, over 20% of China's oil imports from Russia were being settled in yuan, reflecting a significant bilateral shift away from dollar-denominated transactions following the 2022 Ukraine invasion sanctions.
events.source_excerpt: Over 20% of China's oil imports from Russia were settled in yuan by mid-2023.

events.title: AIPAC 2024 Cycle Spending Reaches ~$126.9 Million
events.description: AIPAC PAC and its United Democracy Project super PAC spent a combined ~$126.9 million during the 2024 election cycle, more than doubling from ~$44 million in 2022. Money reached 349 senators and House members (65% of Congress), covering more than 80% of races.
events.source_excerpt: AIPAC PAC plus its United Democracy Project super PAC spent a combined ~$126.9 million (FEC filings via Sludge). This more than doubled from ~$44 million in 2022.

events.title: AIPAC Spends $14.6 Million to Defeat Rep. Jamaal Bowman
events.description: AIPAC's United Democracy Project spent $14.6 million to defeat Rep. Jamaal Bowman in his primary, the most expensive outside spending on a House race in history. AIPAC also spent $8.6 million targeting Rep. Cori Bush, both progressive critics of Israel policy.
events.source_excerpt: AIPAC's UDP spent $14.6 million to defeat Rep. Jamaal Bowman (the most expensive outside spending on a House race in history) and $8.6 million targeting Rep. Cori Bush — both progressive critics of Israel policy.

events.title: Miriam Adelson Donates $120 Million+ to Trump 2024 via Preserve America PAC
events.description: Miriam Adelson donated over $120 million to Trump's 2024 campaign through Preserve America PAC, making her the single largest individual donor to outside groups in the cycle. Republican Jewish Coalition separately spent $13.3 million in outside spending.
events.source_excerpt: Preserve America PAC (Adelson) | $120M+ to Trump 2024 | Single largest individual donor to outside groups

events.title: Marco Rubio Confirmed as Secretary of State
events.description: Marco Rubio began serving as US Secretary of State in January 2025. Per Track AIPAC, Rubio collected more than $1 million in Israel lobby campaign contributions since 2010.
events.source_excerpt: He has served since January 2025. Per Track AIPAC, Rubio collected >$1 million in Israel lobby campaign contributions since 2010.

events.title: AIPAC Lobbying Costs Surge in First Half of 2025
events.description: In 2025, AIPAC increased lobbying costs to $1.8 million in the first half alone, up 12.5% year-over-year, and PAC contributions surged 88% to $12.8 million in six months.
events.source_excerpt: In 2025, AIPAC further increased lobbying costs to $1.8 million in the first half alone (up 12.5% year-over-year) and PAC contributions surged 88% to $12.8 million in six months.

events.title: Russia-China Yuan Oil Trade Reaches $19.14 Billion Annually
events.description: Russia-China crude oil trade settled in yuan reached $19.14 billion in 2025, reflecting the accelerated de-dollarization of bilateral energy trade following Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine and subsequent Western sanctions.
events.source_excerpt: Russia-China trade shifted rapidly after the 2022 Ukraine sanctions — $19.14 billion in crude oil was settled in yuan in 2025.

events.title: India's Foreign Minister Explicitly Rejects BRICS Single Currency to Replace Dollar
events.description: Indian External Affairs Minister Jaishankar publicly stated India has no policy to replace the dollar, reflecting a fundamental internal divide within BRICS over de-dollarization ambitions.
events.source_excerpt: India's External Affairs Minister Jaishankar explicitly stated in March 2025: 'I do not believe we have any policy to have a replacement to the dollar.'
